markSessionTurnsAsCompleted appends a synthetic status AgentEvent into persisted eventsByTurn when a turn lacks a terminal event. RESOLVED at R2 Stage 3a-B (260502 plan) — the synthetic event is now constructed via buildAgentEvent.status(payload, envelope) which enforces status.requiredForNewEvents = ['sessionId', 'turnId'] envelope axes at compile time. Reader shape-compatibility preserved (event.type === 'status' && event.message === INTERRUPTION_MESSAGE).

Consumes each appended AgentEvent, records tool-start side-channel state, and later replays the flat event list through updateConversationWithEvent; this is accumulator/reducer behavior, not an eventsByTurn Record read.

Schema collision guard (Phase-2 P0-1) ensures real AgentEvent error events route to onEvent, not silently dropped via control branch.
